treatment_information.treatment_response: O2 sats improved and she was weaned to 4 L nasal cannula.
Patient stated that her voice and throat was starting to feel better.

treatment_timeline.event: Patient presented to the ED with dyspnea and hoarseness.
Patient received 1 mg PO Ativan for anxiety.
Patient was weaned to 4 L nasal cannula.
Patient reported improvement in voice and throat.

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow-up appointments recommended for anxiety and weight monitoring.
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Patient appeared comfortable and was able to speak in full sentences.
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient felt that using a throat lozenge might have helped her throat.
